g.text: Rationale: Male prefrontal cortex matures ~25-30 (Giedd/NIH, Lebel & Beaulieu 2011).
Extending to 35 ensures 5-10 years of mature-brain operation to validate outcomes.
Eligibility is governed by Character + Reputation.
Progression: Allowance → Bounties → Projects → Entrepreneurship → Stewardship
"Value creation creates opportunity. Character determines eligibility.
Trust unlocks responsibility. Responsibility unlocks freedom."
Goal: Not blind belief. Not rebellion.
: "Is Robert becoming a wise, capable, kind, and independent man?"
• Male PFC maturation: ~25-30 (Giedd, NIH longitudinal study; Lebel & Beaulieu 2011)
• Female PFC maturation: ~21-24 (Ingalhalikar et al., U. Penn, 2014)
• Extending to 35 validates mature-brain decisions over 5-10 year window
• Limbic system (emotion/risk) dominates until PFC catches up — this explains adolescent behavior
